translated: I love how Ena is meeting Big Sister for the first time,
and she's just totally overwhelmed by her pushy personality.
It's so good.
If you haven't seen the event story yet, please check it out.
Seeing all of Nightcord at 25:00 talking with Big Sister is a must-see.
Next up, isn't this Ena amazing?
I think girls with their hair tucked behind their ears are great, and this illustration...
is just incredibly good.
I honestly thought she was a florist.
Ena looks so pretty.
The way she's looking down slightly is also wonderful.
Ena is just so cute.
Next is Len.
It's so cute how he's eating the souvenir from Big Sister.
Really.
Why is this so adorable?
Even if that were a protein bar, it would still be cute.
He's just always eating something.
Moving on to the Trained version.
Isn't this insane?
I thought it was incredible.
I was thinking, only you could pull off short shorts like that.
Seriously.
I'm just so grateful for this.
The overall style is quite rare for Nightcord, which is really nice.
Is he holding a book about daisy flowers?
My knowledge of daisies is a bit shallow, but I'm pretty sure that's what it is.
It's lovely.
The idea of sharing something delicious is so sweet.
Everything tastes better when you share it.
And this one...
Kanade.
So cute.
These clothes look exactly like something Mizuki or Yuki-san would pick out.
Especially around here.
She looks a little troubled.
But of course, it suits her perfectly.
Setting aside where she'd actually wear it, I wonder if Kanade would really wear that headpiece when she goes out.
I'm not really sure.
But...
I think if it looks good on her, she should definitely wear it.
She's truly adorable.
Everyone is always so cute.
Now for the Trained version.
She looks like a young lady from a wealthy family.
I wonder if these are daisies too?
The ones on her chest and her head.
I bet they are.
In the side story, Kanade being forced to try on all those different clothes is also super cute.
I hope you'll all take a look at the side story as well.
Everyone is just saying how cute they are.
Seriously.
It's great.
I feel like it's quite rare to see Nightcord wearing white.
I've realized that after doing all these After Talks.
Mafuyu.
You know...
It might not be a full smile, but seeing Mafuyu with more of a grin made me so happy and brightened my heart during this event story.
I think it's wonderful that all the illustrations have such a sense of warmth.
Thank you very much.
So, that was the illustration corner. Moving on...
Parsley Onuma wrote a new song specifically for this event.
We're going to watch the 3DMV for "Kazarite" and talk about the song.
Before we watch the 3DMV, I'd like to share some comments we received from the Sega 3DMV production team.
In the 3DMV for "Kazarite," we used the visual of falling into water to express Mizuki's wavering emotions that they can't honestly share with the other members.
This time, we used the insert function and spent a lot of time on the underwater falling sequence.
We went through a lot of trial and error to achieve this expression.
There are still challenges in fully depicting a character's state of mind,
but we hope you'll enjoy this new form of expression through Mizuki.
That was the comment.
Now, let's take a look at the 3DMV.
Did you see that face just now?
She was smiling.
That was so good.
